prompt: Studio product photography of a single clear glass pharmaceutical peptide research vial, 2mL capacity, with a standard silver aluminum crimp seal cap with a removable center disc (flip-off style). The vial has a completely blank white wraparound label — NO text, NO logos, NO writing of any kind on the label. The label is a clean matte white rectangle wrapping around the center of the vial. White lyophilized powder cake visible at the bottom inside the glass. The vial stands perfectly upright, centered in frame, on a pure white (#FFFFFF) seamless background with very soft shadow directly beneath. Camera is positioned at exact eye level, perfectly centered, looking straight at the front of the vial. Soft diffused studio lighting from directly above with subtle fill from left and right. No harsh shadows, no dramatic lighting. Clinical, clean, pharmaceutical. Shot on medium format digital camera, 100mm macro lens, f/5.6, sharp focus throughout. The vial occupies roughly 60% of the frame height. Photorealistic product photography.

Professional product photograph of one clear glass pharmaceutical vial, 2mL size, sealed with a silver aluminum flip-off crimp cap. The vial has a plain white label wrapped around its body — the label is completely blank with zero text, zero logos, zero markings. Inside the vial, a small white lyophilized powder cake sits at the bottom. The vial is standing upright on a pure white background with a very subtle soft shadow. The camera angle is dead center, eye-level, looking straight at the front face of the label. Lighting is soft, even, and diffused — like a pharmaceutical catalog shoot. No colored accents, no props, no other objects. Just one vial, perfectly centered, perfectly lit. Clean, minimal, clinical. Photorealistic. Medium format camera, macro lens, f/5.6.

A single pharmaceutical research vial photographed for a product catalog. Clear borosilicate glass, 2mL, sealed with a standard silver metallic aluminum crimp cap with flip-off center. A clean blank white paper label is wrapped around the middle of the vial body — the label has absolutely no text, no printing, no graphics, nothing — just plain white paper. You can see white lyophilized powder inside the vial through the clear glass below the label. Pure white studio background. Perfectly centered composition, shot straight-on at eye level. Even, flat lighting with no harsh shadows — pharmaceutical product photography style. The vial is the only object in the image. Photorealistic, sharp, clinical. 100mm macro, f/5.6.

Product photography: one clear glass 2mL pharmaceutical vial with silver aluminum crimp seal cap (flip-off center disc style). Blank white label wrapped around the vial — completely empty, no text or markings whatsoever. White freeze-dried powder visible inside through the glass. Standing upright on white seamless paper background. Centered in frame. Straight-on camera angle at eye level. Soft overhead diffused lighting, no harsh shadows. Ultra-clean, pharmaceutical catalog style. No other objects in frame. Photorealistic. Medium format, 100mm macro, f/5.6, tack sharp.
